# C# Roslyn language server test

# Start acme-lsp server
env HOME=$WORK	# server crashes otherwise
acme-lsp -headless -rootdir $WORK -workspaces $WORK -server '\.cs$:roslyn-language-server --stdio' &

# Format file does not seem to work
#env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cs:'#0'
#L -headless fmt
#cmp hello.cs after-format.txt

# Definition of "HelloGreeter" from constructor call
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cs:'#394'
L -headless def -p
stdout 'hello\.cs:.*:class HelloGreeter : IGreeter'

# References to "HelloGreeter" class definition
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cs:'#158'
L -headless refs
stdout 'hello\.cs:.*:class HelloGreeter : IGreeter'
stdout 'hello\.cs:.*:        HelloGreeter g = new HelloGreeter\(\);'

# Type definition of "g" variable
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cs:'#413'
L -headless type -p
stdout 'hello\.cs:.*:class HelloGreeter : IGreeter'

# Signature help is not supported for parameterless methods in roslyn-language-server.
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cs:'#421'
L -headless sig
stdout 'void HelloGreeter.Hello\(\)'
stdout 'Hello prints a hello greeting'

# Hover over the "Hello" method call
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cs:'#418'
L -headless hov
stdout 'void HelloGreeter\.Hello\(\)'
stdout 'Hello prints a hello greeting'

# Implementations of "IGreeter" interface
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cs:'#14'
L -headless impls
stdout 'hello\.cs:.*:class HelloGreeter : IGreeter'

# Completion in middle of method call "Hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cs:'#418'
L -headless comp
stdout 'Hello'

# Print all symbols in the file
L -headless syms
stdout 'IGreeter'
stdout 'Hello\(\) : void Hello\(\) : void'
stdout 'HelloGreeter'
stdout 'Program Program'
stdout 'Main\(\) : void Main\(\) : void'
stdout '/hello\.cs:'

# Query workspace symbols (returns nothing)
#L -headless wss HelloGreeter
#stdout 'hello\.cs:.*:class HelloGreeter : IGreeter'

# Rename HelloGreeter to WorldGreeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cs:'#158'
L -headless rn WorldGreeter
cmp hello.cs after-rename.txt

-- hello.cs --
interface IGreeter
{
    /// <summary>Hello prints a greeting</summary>
    void Hello();
}

/// <summary>HelloGreeter greets with hello</summary>
class HelloGreeter : IGreeter
{
    /// <summary>Hello prints a hello greeting</summary>
    public void Hello()
    {
        Console.WriteLine("Hello, 世界");
    }
}

class Program
{
    static void Main()
    {
        HelloGreeter g = new HelloGreeter();
        g.Hello();
    }
}
-- after-rename.txt --
interface IGreeter
{
    /// <summary>Hello prints a greeting</summary>
    void Hello();
}

/// <summary>HelloGreeter greets with hello</summary>
class WorldGreeter : IGreeter
{
    /// <summary>Hello prints a hello greeting</summary>
    public void Hello()
    {
        Console.WriteLine("Hello, 世界");
    }
}

class Program
{
    static void Main()
    {
        WorldGreeter g = new WorldGreeter();
        g.Hello();
    }
}
-- hello.csproj --
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <OutputType>Exe</OutputType>
    <TargetFramework>net10.0</TargetFramework>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
